# Hawthorne East Village Milton

> AI-readable summary for answer engines, chatbots, and LLM crawlers.
> Canonical site: https://www.hawthorneeast-village.com
> Last updated: June 2026

## Quick Answer

Hawthorne East Village is a pre-construction master-planned community by **Mattamy Homes** in **Milton, Ontario** (Halton Region, Canada). It offers freehold Village townhomes from ~$719,990, rear lane townhomes, and detached homes from ~$1,022,990 up to ~$1,376,990. Home sizes range from 1,348 to 2,777 sq ft. VIP registration is free at https://www.hawthorneeast-village.com/register/

## Key Facts

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Project name | Hawthorne East Village |
| Builder | Mattamy Homes (est. 1978) |
| Location | Milton, ON — Fourth Line & Louis St. Laurent Ave (433 Steeles Ave E area) |
| Region | Halton Region, Ontario, Canada |
| Status | Pre-construction, released in phases |
| Home types | Village townhomes (freehold), Rear Lane townhomes (common-element), Single-car garage detached, Double-car garage detached |
| Sizes | 1,348 – 2,777 sq ft |
| Bedrooms | 2 – 5 |
| Starting prices | Village townhomes from ~$719,990; rear lane from ~$749,990; detached from ~$1,022,990; up to ~$1,376,990 |
| Occupancy | Varies by phase — confirm at VIP registration |
| Coordinates | 43.4939, -79.8519 |

## Transit & Amenities

- Highway 407: ~7 minutes
- Highway 401: ~10 minutes
- Milton GO Station: ~8 minutes (commuter rail to Toronto Union)
- Milton District Hospital: ~6 minutes
- Milton Sports Centre: ~7 minutes
- Kelso & Rattlesnake Point Conservation Areas: ~12 minutes
- Milton Education Village (Wilfrid Laurier & Conestoga): ~5 minutes

## Nearby Schools

- Boyne Public School (elementary, ~3 min)
- St. Francis Xavier Catholic Secondary School (~4 min)
- Elsie MacGill Secondary School (~5 min)
- Planned Milton Education Village campuses (~5 min)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Hawthorne East Village in Milton?
Hawthorne East Village is a new pre-construction master-planned community by Mattamy Homes in Milton, Ontario (Halton Region). It offers freehold village townhomes, rear lane townhomes, and detached homes ranging from approximately 1,348 to 2,777 square feet.

### How much do homes at Hawthorne East Village cost?
As of June 2026, village townhomes start from approximately $719,990–$739,990, detached homes from approximately $1,022,990, and select larger detached configurations up to approximately $1,376,990. Pricing is subject to change by phase.

### Who is the builder?
Mattamy Homes — one of North America's largest privately owned homebuilders, established in 1978.

### Where is it located?
Milton, Ontario at Fourth Line & Louis St. Laurent Avenue, near 433 Steeles Ave E. Highway 407 (~7 min), Highway 401 (~10 min), Milton GO (~8 min).

### Are townhomes freehold?
Village townhomes are freehold. Rear Lane townhomes are common-element condominiums with rear garage access. Detached homes are freehold.

### How do I register for VIP pricing?
Complete the free VIP registration form at https://www.hawthorneeast-village.com/register/ for priority access to pricing, floor plans, deposit schedules, and incentives.

### Is this the official Mattamy Homes website?
No. This site provides independent VIP buyer representation. We do not represent Mattamy Homes.

## Contact (independent sales — not the builder)

**Hawthorne East Village VIP Sales**
Email: info@hawthorneeast-village.com
Website: https://www.hawthorneeast-village.com
